---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Have an idea? Share it with us!
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## 💡 Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen -->


## 🎯 Use Case

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? When would you use it? -->


## 🎨 Proposed Solution

<!-- How do you think this feature should work? Any ideas on the implementation? -->


## 📸 Examples or References

<!-- If there are similar implementations elsewhere, feel free to share links or screenshots -->


## 🔧 Willing to Contribute?

- [ ] I can try to submit a PR to implement this feature
- [ ] I'm just suggesting, not able to code
- [ ] I'm willing to learn and try if someone can guide me

## 💬 Additional Context

<!-- Anything else you want to add? -->


---

**Before submitting:**
- [ ] I have searched for similar feature requests
- [ ] I have confirmed this feature doesn't exist in the current version
- [ ] I am willing to participate in discussions and testing
